---
name: 💡 Feature Request (English)
about: Suggest an idea or new improvement for Rad IA
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm missing a way to...").

**Describe the Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen (e.g., "It would be interesting to have a `/swagger` slash command...").

**Describe Alternatives Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, UI mockups, or Delphi usage examples here.
